---
title: "SLAM Metabolic Class ITP treatment response"
subtitle: "Cohort 2005, predicted from Cohorts 2010, 2011, 2015, 2016"
author: "William Mueller, Joshua Preston"
data: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y %B %d')`"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
--- 

```{r setup, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
library(consoler)
library(SLAM)
set.seed(365)

# setting global knitr options for r markdown output
knitr::opts_chunk$set(autodep = TRUE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = FALSE)
```

# Load in input data

```{r read csv}
surv <- read.csv("data/itp_tx_control_surv.csv")
surv <- surv[, c("idno", "le_wk", "dead_censor")]

predicted <- read.csv("data/test_census.csv")
predicted_keep <- c(
  "idno",
  "sex",
  "sex_M",
  "sex_F",
  "cohort",
  "site",
  "le_wk",
  "dead_censor",
  "prob1",
  "prob2",
  "prob3",
  "new_class_bw"
)
predicted <- predicted[, predicted_keep]

tx_info <- read.csv("data/itp_tx_control_test.csv")
tx_info <- tx_info[, c("idno", "tx")]
tx_info <- tx_info[!duplicated(tx_info$idno), ]
```

# Merge predicted and tx response

```{r merge}
predicted <- merge(tx_info, predicted, by = "idno", all.x = TRUE)
predicted$tx_cohort <- paste0(predicted$tx, "_", predicted$cohort)

predicted <- predicted[predicted$le_wk > 86, ]
```

# Create tx KM Curves

```{r km creation, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 18}
classes <- sort(unique(predicted$new_class_bw))

plots <- lapply(classes, function(class) {
  index <- predicted$new_class_bw == class
  data <- predicted[index, ]
  plot_km <- SLAM::surv_plot_km(data,
    var = "tx",
    age_death = "le_wk",
    event = "dead_censor",
    title = paste("Predicted Class", class),
    pval = "",
    surv.median.line = "v"
  )
  plot <- plot_km$plot$plot +
    ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
      labels = c("Control", "Rapamycin"),
      values = c("tx=control" = "navyblue", "tx=rapa" = "indianred1")
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 86, color = "indianred") +
    ggplot2::theme_bw()
  hrs <- plot_km$hr
  list(plot = plot, hr = hrs)
})

hrs <- lapply(plots, `[[`, "hr")
plots <- lapply(plots, `[[`, "plot")


title_theme <- cowplot::ggdraw() +
  cowplot::draw_label("Rapamycin Treatment Response by Predicted Class")

plots_panel <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  plotlist = plots, nrow = 1, byrow = FALSE,
  greedy = FALSE, labels = "AUTO"
)

plots_panel <- cowplot::plot_grid(title_theme, plots_panel,
  rel_heights = c(.05, 1),
  ncol = 1
)
plots_panel
```

```{r print hrs, results = 'asis'}
hrs <- lapply(
  hrs,
  function(table) {
    table$hr_table[, "final", drop = FALSE]
  }
)
for (table in hrs) {
  print(kableExtra::kable(table))
}
```
